info.name: Oracle Database Oracle REST Data Services (ORDS) API
General
Oracle Database Get database status

items.docs: Returns the current status of the Oracle Database instance.

info.name: Oracle Database Get database version

items.docs: Returns the version information of the Oracle Database instance.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all database components

items.docs: Returns a list of all installed database components and their status.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all database parameters

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

items.docs: Returns all database initialization parameters and their current values.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific database parameter

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the database parameter

items.docs: Returns the value and metadata for a specific database parameter.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all database users

items.docs: Returns a list of all database users and their properties.

info.name: Oracle Database Get storage usage in bytes

items.docs: Returns the total storage usage of the database in bytes.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all tablespaces storage information

items.docs: Returns storage information for all tablespaces.

info.name: Oracle Database Get tablespace details

items.docs: Returns detailed storage information for a specific tablespace.

info.name: Oracle Database Get tablespace datafiles

items.docs: Returns datafiles associated with a specific tablespace.

info.name: Oracle Database Get feature usage statistics

items.docs: Returns usage statistics for database features.

info.name: Oracle Database Start a sessionless transaction

items.docs: Starts a new sessionless transaction and returns its identifier.

info.name: Oracle Database Commit a sessionless transaction

items.docs: Commits the specified sessionless transaction.

info.name: Oracle Database Rollback a sessionless transaction

items.docs: Rolls back the specified sessionless transaction.

info.name: Data Dictionary
Oracle Database Get all tables

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

items.docs: Returns metadata for all database tables accessible to the current user.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific table

items.docs: Returns metadata for a specific database table.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all table columns

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

items.docs: Returns column metadata for all tables.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific column

items.docs: Returns metadata for a specific table column.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all indexes

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

items.docs: Returns metadata for all database indexes.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific index

items.docs: Returns metadata for a specific database index.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all functions

items.docs: Returns metadata for all database functions.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific function

items.docs: Returns metadata for a specific database function.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all foreign keys

items.docs: Returns metadata for all foreign key constraints.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all database links

items.docs: Returns metadata for all database links.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific database link

items.docs: Returns metadata for a specific database link.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all tablespaces

items.docs: Returns data dictionary information for all tablespaces.

info.name: Monitoring
Oracle Database Get all sessions

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

items.docs: Returns information about all active database sessions.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific session

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific database session.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all session locks

items.docs: Returns information about all current session locks.

info.name: Oracle Database Get blocking locks

items.docs: Returns information about sessions holding locks that block others.

info.name: Oracle Database Get waiting locks

items.docs: Returns information about sessions waiting to acquire locks.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all alerts

items.docs: Returns all database alerts and notifications.

info.name: Oracle Database Get alert summaries by message level

items.docs: Returns alert summary statistics grouped by message level.

info.name: Oracle Database Get wait class metrics

items.docs: Returns database wait class performance metrics.

info.name: Oracle Database Get wait class totals

items.docs: Returns total wait time statistics by wait class.

info.name: Oracle Database Get session limits

items.docs: Returns the configured session limits and current usage.

info.name: Performance
Oracle Database Get all SQL statements

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip before returning results

items.docs: Returns performance statistics for all SQL statements in the shared pool.

info.name: Oracle Database Get top SQL by CPU usage

items.docs: Returns the top SQL statements ranked by CPU consumption.

info.name: Oracle Database Get SQL statement statistics

items.docs: Returns detailed statistics for a specific SQL statement.

info.name: Oracle Database Get SQL statement text

items.docs: Returns the full SQL text for a specific statement.

info.name: Oracle Database Get SQL execution plan

items.docs: Returns the execution plan for a specific SQL statement.

info.name: Oracle Database Get SQL statement history

items.docs: Returns historical performance data for a specific SQL statement.

info.name: Oracle Database Get active sessions history

items.docs: Returns the active session history (ASH) data.

info.name: Oracle Database Get active session history waits

items.docs: Returns wait event data from the active session history.

info.name: Pluggable Databases
Oracle Database Get all pluggable databases

items.docs: Returns a list of all pluggable databases in the container database.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a pluggable database

items.docs: Creates a new pluggable database in the container database.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific pluggable database

items.docs: Returns details about a specific pluggable database.

info.name: Oracle Database Update a pluggable database

items.docs: Updates properties of a specific pluggable database including open/close state.

info.name: Oracle Database Drop a pluggable database

items.docs: Drops the specified pluggable database from the container database.

info.name: PDB Snapshots
Oracle Database Get all PDB snapshots

items.docs: Returns a list of all PDB snapshots.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a PDB snapshot

items.docs: Creates a new snapshot of the current pluggable database state.

info.name: Oracle Database Configure automatic snapshots

items.docs: Configures automatic snapshot scheduling for the PDB.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific snapshot

items.docs: Returns details about a specific PDB snapshot.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a named PDB snapshot

items.docs: Creates a new snapshot with the specified name.

info.name: Oracle Database Delete a PDB snapshot

items.docs: Deletes the specified PDB snapshot.

info.name: Oracle Database Get snapshot mode

items.docs: Returns the current snapshot mode configuration.

info.name: Data Guard
Oracle Database Get Data Guard broker configuration

items.docs: Returns the current Data Guard broker configuration.

info.name: Oracle Database Add a Data Guard configuration

items.docs: Creates a new Data Guard broker configuration.

info.name: Oracle Database Enable or disable Data Guard configuration

items.docs: Enables or disables the Data Guard broker configuration.

info.name: Oracle Database Remove Data Guard configuration

items.docs: Removes the Data Guard broker configuration.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all Data Guard databases

items.docs: Returns all databases registered with the Data Guard broker.

info.name: Oracle Database Add a database to Data Guard

items.docs: Adds a database to the Data Guard broker configuration.

info.name: Oracle Database Update Data Guard database role

items.docs: Converts, enables, or disables a database in the Data Guard configuration.

info.name: Oracle Database Remove database from Data Guard

items.docs: Removes a database from the Data Guard broker configuration.

info.name: Data Pump
Oracle Database Create a Data Pump export job

items.docs: Creates a new Data Pump export job for data and metadata extraction.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a Data Pump import job

items.docs: Creates a new Data Pump import job for data and metadata loading.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all Data Pump jobs

items.docs: Returns a list of all Data Pump jobs.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific Data Pump job

items.docs: Returns details about a specific Data Pump job.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a Data Pump job file

items.docs: Returns the contents of a specific Data Pump job output file.

info.name: REST Services
Oracle Database Get all REST modules

items.docs: Returns a list of all custom REST API modules.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a REST module

items.docs: Creates a new custom REST API module with SQL or PL/SQL handlers.

info.name: Oracle Database Update a REST module

items.docs: Updates an existing REST API module.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all REST handlers

items.docs: Returns a list of all REST API handlers.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a REST handler

items.docs: Creates a new REST API handler.

info.name: Oracle Database Delete a REST handler

items.docs: Deletes an existing REST API handler.

info.name: Oracle Database Get all OAuth clients

items.docs: Returns a list of all registered OAuth clients.

info.name: Oracle Database Create an OAuth client

items.docs: Registers a new OAuth client for REST API authentication.

info.name: Oracle Database Update an OAuth client

items.docs: Updates an existing OAuth client registration.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a REST privilege

items.docs: Creates a new privilege for controlling access to REST resources.

info.name: Oracle Database Create a REST role

items.docs: Creates a new role for grouping REST privileges.

info.name: Oracle Database REST enable a database object

items.docs: Enables automatic REST access for a database table, view, or PL/SQL object.

info.name: Oracle Database Get ORDS properties

items.docs: Returns all ORDS configuration properties.

info.name: Oracle Database Set an ORDS property

items.docs: Sets or updates an ORDS configuration property.

info.name: Oracle Database Unset an ORDS property

items.docs: Removes an ORDS configuration property, restoring the default value.

info.name: Scheduler
Oracle Database Get all scheduler jobs

items.docs: Returns a list of all Oracle Scheduler jobs.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific scheduler job

items.docs: Returns details about a specific Oracle Scheduler job.

info.name: APEX
Oracle Database Get all APEX workspaces

items.docs: Returns a list of all Oracle APEX workspaces.

info.name: Oracle Database Get a specific APEX workspace

items.docs: Returns details about a specific Oracle APEX workspace.

info.name: Oracle Database Get workspace applications

items.docs: Returns applications in a specific APEX workspace.

info.name: Oracle Database Create or update an APEX application

items.docs: Creates a new or updates an existing APEX application.

info.name: Oracle Database Delete an APEX application

items.docs: Deletes a specific APEX application.

info.name: Oracle Database Get APEX instance overview

items.docs: Returns overview statistics for the APEX instance.

info.name: RDF Graph
Oracle Database List all RDF networks

items.docs: Returns a list of all RDF semantic networks.

info.name: Oracle Database Get RDF network information

items.docs: Returns details about a specific RDF network.

info.name: Oracle Database Create an RDF network

items.docs: Creates a new RDF semantic network.

info.name: Oracle Database List RDF models

items.docs: Returns a list of RDF models in the specified network.

info.name: Oracle Database Execute SPARQL query (GET)

items.docs: Executes a SPARQL query against the specified RDF model using HTTP GET.

info.name: Oracle Database Execute SPARQL query (POST)

items.docs: Executes a SPARQL query against the specified RDF model using HTTP POST.

info.name: Open Service Broker
Oracle Database Get service catalog

items.docs: Returns the Open Service Broker catalog of available services.

info.name: Oracle Database Provision a service instance

items.docs: Provisions a new Open Service Broker service instance.

info.name: Oracle Database Deprovision a service instance

items.docs: Deprovisions an existing Open Service Broker service instance.
